challenges.title: Bank Basics
challenges.question: What is the main purpose of a bank?

options.text: To keep money safe and help it grow

feedback.correct: Excellent! Banks keep your money safe and help it grow!
feedback.wrong: Banks are for keeping money safe and helping it grow, not for toys or games!

challenges.title: Savings Knowledge
challenges.question: What happens when you put money in a savings account?

options.text: It stays safe and earns interest
The bank uses it for free

feedback.correct: Perfect! Money in savings is safe and earns interest!
feedback.wrong: Your money is safe in savings accounts and even earns interest over time!

challenges.title: Card Security
challenges.question: What should you NEVER do with your ATM card?

feedback.correct: Great! Never share your PIN with anyone, not even friends or family!
feedback.wrong: Your PIN should never be shared with anyone, including family!

challenges.title: Bank Safety
challenges.question: Why do banks have security guards and cameras?

feedback.correct: Right! Security measures protect everyone's money!
feedback.wrong: Security guards and cameras are there to protect everyone's money!

challenges.title: Bank Services
challenges.question: Which service do banks provide to help people?

options.text: Loans to start businesses or buy homes

feedback.correct: Perfect! Banks provide loans to help people start businesses and buy homes!
feedback.wrong: Banks provide loans to help people achieve their goals like starting businesses or buying homes!
